title: Levoit Core 300 Air Purifier White
description_text: Refresh your home’s air with the Levoit Core 300-P Air Purifier. The Pre-Filter removes large airborne particles like dust and hair, the Main Filter captures at least 99.97% of airborne particles down to 0.3 microns, and the Activated Carbon Filter removes smoke, odors, fumes and VOCs (Volatile Organic Compounds). This air purifier cleans the air in a room up to 1,073 ft² with noise levels as low as 22dB, helping you breathe cleaner air while maintaining a peaceful home.
bullet_text: Industry or Government Certifications: ETL Listed, CARB Certified
Allergens Captured: Pollen, Tobacco Smoke, Odors, Fireplace Smoke, Pet Dander, Dustmite Debris, Household Dust
Warranty: 1 Year Limited Warranty. To obtain a copy of the manufacturer's or supplier's warranty for this item prior to purchasing the item, please call Target Guest Services at 1-800-591-3869
